title: Architecture freeze: finalize event taxonomy and lifecycle invariants
summary: Freeze the transaction event taxonomy and lifecycle invariants for 0.4.0 before implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Event taxonomy covers all lifecycle boundaries listed in plan.md with explicit event_type names.
Lifecycle invariants are enumerated and align with the 0.4.0 transaction model.
Outputs are concise and unambiguous enough to drive implementation without additional clarification.
tasks: Derive a complete event taxonomy from plan.md sections 4 and 5.
Document lifecycle invariants and terminal conditions for transactions.
Cross-check taxonomy and invariants against recovery requirements.
notes: Breaking redesign: backward compatibility is out of scope.
Keep taxonomy compact; prefer canonical names over aliases.
